item.title: 小米 MiMo-V2.5 系列 API 永久降价，最高降幅 99%
item.guid: 小米-MiMo-V2.5-系列-API-永久降价，最高降幅-99%
item.description:
Early this morning, Xiaomi Technology announced a permanent price reduction for its MiMo-V2.5 series APIs, with the highest reduction reaching 99% compared to the original pricing, and no longer distinguishing between context window lengths. 今天凌晨，小米技术宣布，对旗下 MiMo-V2.5 系列 API 进行永久降价，相比原始定价最高降幅可达 99%，且不再区分上下文窗口长度。

The MiMo-V2.5-Pro input cache hit price has been reduced from previously ≤256k window's ¥2.80 / million tokens to ¥0.025, a reduction of approximately 99%; the input cache miss price has been reduced from ¥7.00 to ¥3.00, a reduction of approximately 57%; and the output price has been reduced from ¥21.00 to ¥6.00, a reduction of approximately 71%.

At the same time, the Token Plan billing system has been optimized, with prices remaining unchanged, but available quantities increasing to 5 to 8 times their original amounts. The MiMo-V2.5 Standard Edition (¥99) package's available token quantity has been upgraded from 200M to 1300M, and the Pro package (¥329) from 700M to 4700M. 与此同时，Token Plan 计费体系同步优化，定价不变，可用量提升至原来的 5 至 8 倍。MiMo-V2.5 标准版（¥99）套餐可用 Token 数量从原来的 200M 升级至 1300M，Pro 套餐（¥329）从 700M 升至 4700M。

In addition to the price reduction, Xiaomi also announced the early conclusion of its "Hundred Trillion Token Creator Incentive Program". The program, launched on April 28, has distributed all 100 trillion tokens as of 16:08 Beijing time on May 26. 在降价之外，小米还宣布「百万亿 Token 创造者激励计划」提前收官。该计划自 4 月 28 日上线，截至今日北京时间 5 月 26 日 16:08，100 万亿 Tokens 已全部发放完毕。

item.title: QuestMobile：AI 原生 App 月活达到 4.61 亿
item.guid: QuestMobile：AI-原生-App-月活达到-4.61-亿
item.description:
Research firm QuestMobile yesterday released a research report on AI platform adoption logic and source preferences. The report shows that as of April 2026, the monthly active user base of AI-native apps reached 461 million, with average monthly usage times and duration per person being 91 times and 180 minutes, respectively. 调研机构 QuestMobile 昨日发布 AI 平台采信逻辑与信源偏好研究报告。报告显示，截至 2026 年 4 月，AI 原生 App 月活用户规模达到 4.61 亿，月人均使用次数和时长分别为 91 次、180 分钟。

The report also mentioned that the average monthly usage duration for Doubao and DeepSeek was 144.6 minutes and 109.5 minutes, respectively, representing year-on-year growth of 80.6% and 106.9%. 报告还提到，豆包、DeepSeek 月人均使用时长分别为 144.6 分钟和 109.5 分钟，同比增长 80.6% 和 106.9%。

🔗 Related Reading: Stop blindly installing Doubao! We tested five domestic AI apps, and the strongest one turned out to be... 🔗 相关阅读： 别再无脑装豆包了！实测五款国产 AI App，最强的竟是…

item.title: 小米一季度营收 991 亿元，经调整净利润 60.72 亿元
item.guid: 小米一季度营收-991-亿元，经调整净利润-60.72-亿元
item.description:
Xiaomi Group yesterday released its Q1 2026 fiscal year financial report. Quarterly total operating revenue was 99.1 billion yuan, a year-on-year decrease of 10.9%; net profit attributable to parent company was 4.723 billion yuan, a year-on-year decrease of 56.76%; adjusted net profit was 6.072 billion yuan, a year-on-year decrease of 43.1%. By segment: 小米集团昨日发布 2026 财年第一财季财报，季度营业总收入 991 亿元，同比下降 10.9%；归母净利润 47.23 亿元，同比下降 56.76%；经调整净利润 60.72 亿元，同比下降 43.1%。分部来看：

    Mobile × AIoT segment revenue was 79.3 billion yuan, a year-on-year decrease of 14.5%, with a segment gross profit margin of 22.5%;

    Smart electric vehicles and AI and other innovative businesses revenue was 19.9 billion yuan, a year-on-year increase of 6.9%, with a segment gross profit margin of 20.1%, and an operating loss of 3.1 billion yuan;

    Overall gross profit margin for Q1 was 22.0%, a year-on-year decrease of 0.8 percentage points, and a quarter-on-quarter increase of 1.2 percentage points;

    Xiaomi MiMo-V2.5-Pro ranked joint first globally among open-source models in Artificial Analysis's comprehensive intelligence index and agent index, with a planned investment of 60 billion yuan in AI over the next three years.

At the evening's earnings conference, Xiaomi Group President Lu Weibing officially announced that a new large-scale vehicle, built on an entirely new platform, will be launched in the second half of this year, with multiple models planned, describing it as "very innovative" and "very competitive". 在晚间的财报会上，小米集团总裁卢伟冰在会上正式预告，一款基于全新平台打造的大型新车将于今年下半年上市，并规划有多款车型，称其「非常有创新」「非常有竞争力」。

Lu Weibing explained the reasons for the decline in YU7 sales at the conference: on one hand, longer delivery cycles led some users to switch to competing products; on the other hand, there was a lack of initial product line planning, with the absence of an entry-level standard version, resulting in insufficient appeal to commuters in central cities. 卢伟冰在会上解释了 YU7 销量回落的原因：一方面，较长交付周期导致部分用户转向竞品；另一方面，初期产品线规划存在缺失，入门标准版缺席，导致对中心城市通勤用户吸引力不足。

To address this, Xiaomi launched the YU7 Standard Edition and the high-performance YU7 GT, completing its product matrix with a "one low, one high" strategy. He stated that current store test drives and order feedback are positive, and he remains confident in achieving the annual delivery target of 550,000 units. 为此，小米推出了 YU7 标准版与高性能版 YU7 GT，以「一低一高」策略补齐产品矩阵。他表示，目前门店试驾及锁单反馈良好，对实现全年 55 万辆交付目标仍有信心。

Regarding overseas expansion plans, Lu Weibing revealed that Xiaomi Auto plans to begin its overseas venture in the third and fourth quarters of next year, starting with Europe. It will adopt a phased strategy: developed countries first, then developing countries; high-end first, then mid-range; right-hand drive first, then left-hand drive. Relevant preparatory work is currently underway. 在出海规划方面，卢伟冰透露，小米汽车计划于明年三、四季度启动出海，首战欧洲，采取先发达国家后发展中国家、先高端后中端、先右舵后左舵的分阶段策略。目前相关准备工作正在推进中。

item.title: 滴滴全国多地出现系统故障
item.guid: 滴滴全国多地出现系统故障
item.description:
According to BNN, yesterday around 17:40, multiple users reported Didi Chuxing system failures on social platforms. Problems included inability to start trips, app flashing and freezing, abnormal positioning, inability to display driver location, and drivers being unable to locate passengers. 据鞭牛士报道，昨日 17:40 左右，多名用户在社交平台反馈滴滴出行系统故障，问题包括无法开启行程、App 闪屏卡顿、定位异常、无法显示司机位置，以及司机端无法定位乘客。

Screenshots circulating online show that some users encountered messages like "Sorry, there was a network problem, please try again later" or "Too many orders, Didi can't handle it, please try again later" after hailing a ride. The report mentioned that users in Guangdong, Jiangsu, Beijing, Jiangxi, Xinjiang, and other places reported abnormalities, and Didi's enterprise services were also affected. 网传截图显示，部分用户在打车后遇到「抱歉，网络出了点问题，请稍后重试」「订单太多小滴扛不住了，请稍候再试」等提示。报道提到，广东、江苏、北京、江西、新疆等地均有用户反馈异常，企业滴滴服务也受到影响。

That evening, Didi officially posted an apology: 当晚，滴滴官方发文致歉：

We are very sorry. Due to a network dedicated line failure by a cloud vendor, some Didi App services experienced a brief outage around 5 PM today. Services have now been fully restored. We are urgently addressing issues such as abnormal charges incurred during the outage and will resolve them properly as soon as possible.

item.title: Google CEO 解释 AI 编程落后原因：缺少 Cursor 这样的用户入口
item.guid: Google-CEO-解释-AI-编程落后原因：缺少-Cursor-这样的用户入口
item.description:
Recently, Google CEO Sundar Pichai, during an exclusive interview on The New York Times' podcast "Hard Fork," publicly admitted for the first time that Google is currently lagging behind the industry forefront in the field of AI-assisted programming. 日前，Google CEO 桑达尔·皮查伊（Sundar Pichai）在《纽约时报》旗下播客节目《Hard Fork》接受专访时，首次公开承认 Google 在 AI 辅助编程领域目前落后于行业前沿。

He attributed the reason to the lack of editor entry points like Cursor or Claude Code that can be directly embedded into developers' daily workflows—this absence led to Google losing the most critical dynamic workflow data, thereby slowing down the model's iteration speed in agent programming scenarios. 他将原因归结为缺少像 Cursor 或 Claude Code 这样能直接嵌入开发者日常工作流的编辑器入口——这一缺失导致 Google 流失了最关键的动态工作流数据，进而拖慢了模型在智能体编程场景下的迭代速度。

In the interview, Pichai focused on showcasing the closed-loop test data of Google's internal AI programming tool, Antigravity, including a weekly doubling of internal token consumption and the ability to build an operating system from scratch in 12 hours during extreme performance tests. 皮查伊在专访中侧重展示了 Google 内部 AI 编程工具 Antigravity 的闭环测试数据，包括内部 Token 消耗量每周翻倍，以及在极端性能测试中用 12 小时从零构建出操作系统。

He stated that Google's underlying technology foundation remains complete, and its current passive position in the open market primarily stems from the limited breadth of application scenarios and user feedback loops, rather than a fundamental lack of underlying capabilities. 他表示，Google 底层技术底座依然完备，当前在公开市场的被动，主要源于应用场景与用户反馈闭环的广度限制，而非底层能力的根本性缺失。

item.title: 小红书上线音频播客业务
item.guid: 小红书上线音频播客业务
item.description:
Yesterday, Xiaohongshu announced the launch of its audio podcast business at the New Generation Creation Festival, enabling direct audio uploads from PC and mobile, and supporting PC-side RSS synchronization for importing podcast content. 昨天，小红书在新生代创作盛典上宣布上线音频播客业务，开放 PC 端和移动端音频直接上传，并支持 PC 端通过 RSS 同步导入播客内容。

The new feature will display podcasts on the creator's homepage. Xiaohongshu also plans to launch a dedicated podcast channel in the "Discover" section, supporting audio listening features such as mini-player playback, resume playback, screen-off playback, timed shutdown, and 15-second fast forward/rewind. 新功能会把播客展示在创作者首页。小红书还计划在发现栏目上线播客独立频道，并支持小窗播放、断点续播、熄屏播放、定时关闭和 15 秒快进快退等音频收听功能。

item.title: 特斯拉高管：正研究三电机版 Model 3 的可行性
item.guid: 特斯拉高管：正研究三电机版-Model-3-的可行性
item.description:
Recently, Lars Moravy, Tesla's VP of Engineering, revealed in a special episode of the "Ride the Lightning" podcast that he is researching the feasibility of equipping the Model 3 with a triple-motor system. 近日，特斯拉工程副总裁拉尔斯·莫拉维在《Ride the Lightning》播客特别节目中透露，他正在研究为 Model 3 搭载三电机系统的可行性。

When directly asked by host Ryan McCaffrey on the show whether the Model 3 would be equipped with three motors, Moravy did not deny this direction, stating that he has "been seriously thinking about it." 莫拉维在节目中被主持人瑞安·麦卡弗里直接追问 Model 3 是否会配备三电机时，并未否认这一方向，表示「一直在认真思考这件事」。

He specifically mentioned his hope to introduce carbon-sleeved motors to the Model 3 platform—a technology that is the core hardware enabling the Model S Plaid's sustained powerful acceleration capabilities. 他特别提到希望将碳纤维套筒电机引入 Model 3 平台——这一技术正是 Model S Plaid 得以实现持续强劲加速能力的核心硬件。

Currently, the Model 3 Performance uses a front and rear dual-motor layout. If a third motor were to be added within the rear subframe, engineering space would be extremely limited. Moravy admitted that this is a "high-investment, return-needs-to-be-weighed" plan that does not align with Tesla's overall development goals at this stage. 目前，Model 3 Performance 采用前后双电机布局。若要在后副车架内加装第三台电机，工程空间将极为有限。莫拉维坦承，这是一项「高投入、需权衡回报」的规划，在现阶段与特斯拉整体发展目标并不契合。

He further explained that all of the company's current high-performance R&D resources have been concentrated on the new generation Roadster. This flagship sports car will feature Tesla's latest generation motor technology and is currently the engineering team's top priority. Moravy stated that once the Roadster officially enters production, related high-performance motor technology is expected to extend to other models in the future. 他进一步解释，公司当前全部高性能研发资源已集中投入新一代 Roadster。这款旗舰跑车将搭载特斯拉最新一代电机技术，是目前工程团队的优先级所在。莫拉维表示，一旦 Roadster 正式投产，相关高性能电机技术未来有望向其他车型延伸。

item.title: 启境汽车宣布全国首批 300 家相关门店陆续开业，覆盖 70 城
item.guid: 启境汽车宣布全国首批-300-家相关门店陆续开业，覆盖-70-城
item.description:
Qijing Auto announced yesterday that the first batch of 300 related stores nationwide are successively opening, covering first and second-tier cities such as Beijing, Shanghai, Guangzhou, Shenzhen, Hangzhou, Wuhan, and Zhengzhou, totaling 70 cities. The newly opened stores come in two forms. 启境汽车昨日宣布，全国首批 300 家相关门店正陆续上线开业，覆盖北京、上海、广州、深圳、杭州、武汉、郑州等一二线城市，合计 70 城。此次开业门店分为两种形态。

    "User Centers," operated directly by Qijing or authorized dealers, primarily provide full-process services including sales consultation, in-store vehicle viewing, test drive appointments, vehicle delivery, and after-sales service;

    "Experience Centers," jointly created by Yinwang, Qijing, and authorized dealers, are positioned as immersive experience spaces, focusing on the display and experience of Huawei Qiankun intelligent driving technology and its equipped models, located in prime urban business districts.

item.title: 东风牵头起草乘用车底盘强制国标过审
item.guid: 东风牵头起草乘用车底盘强制国标过审
item.description:
Dongfeng Motor recently disclosed that the first national mandatory standard it led the drafting of in the passenger car chassis field has been unanimously approved. This standard focuses on brake assist systems and has been under preliminary research for over three years. 东风汽车近日披露，其在乘用车底盘领域牵头起草的首个国家强制标准已全票通过审查。该标准聚焦制动辅助系统，预研至今历时三年多。

The brake assist system identifies the driver's intention during emergency braking when pedal force is insufficient, and instantly maximizes braking force to shorten the braking distance. 制动辅助系统会在驾驶者紧急制动但踩踏力不足时识别驾驶意图，并瞬间把制动力提升至最大，以缩短制动距离。

Dongfeng stated that the installation rate of BAS in newly launched M1 and N1 category vehicles in China is increasing year by year, with over 90% of new passenger car models now equipped with BAS as standard; export models are 100% mandatorily equipped with BAS according to UN Regulation UN R139. 东风称，我国新上市 M1 和 N1 类车型中，BAS 装备率逐年上升，乘用车新车中已有 90% 以上车型标配 BAS；出口车型按联合国法规 UN R139 已 100% 强制装备 BAS。

item.title: 💡 黄仁勋：AI 时代学什么不重要，讲故事、创造力才重要
item.guid: 💡-黄仁勋：AI-时代学什么不重要，讲故事、创造力才重要
item.description:
According to Business Insider, Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang recently discussed educational choices in the AI era during an interview on Channel 4 in the UK. He believes that what is most worth cultivating today is storytelling, creativity, and judgment, rather than betting on a specific discipline in advance. 据《商业内幕》报道，英伟达 CEO 黄仁勋近日在英国 Channel 4 播出的访谈中谈到 AI 时代的教育选择。他认为，今天最值得培养的是讲故事、创造力和判断力，而不是提前押注某一个具体学科。

No matter what you choose as your passion, the only thing you need to do is ask yourself: How can artificial intelligence enhance my learning, my skills, my mission?

Jensen Huang stated that in the past, it was easy to advise children to study physics, engineering, or computer science; but after AI can quickly supplement tool capabilities, a single professional choice is no longer the only answer. 黄仁勋表示，过去人们很容易建议孩子学习物理、工程或计算机科学；但在 AI 可快速补足工具能力后，单一专业选择不再是唯一答案。

His core judgment is that storytelling, creativity, and judgment will continue to hold value. AI can help students enter different fields like a mentor and coach, and learners still need to ask good questions, organize information, evaluate results, and clearly explain complex content. 他的核心判断是，讲故事、创造力和判断力会继续保有价值。AI 可以像导师和教练一样帮助学生进入不同领域，学习者仍要提出好问题、组织信息、评估结果，并把复杂内容讲清楚。

Jensen Huang views AI tools as a way to expand educational feedback: students, whether studying art, science, or engineering, can use AI to get faster practice and explanations. He did not specify majors for students but rather framed "how to use AI to amplify one's judgment" as a new learning framework. 黄仁勋把 AI 工具视为扩大教育反馈的方式：学生无论学习艺术、科学还是工程，都可以借助 AI 获得更快练习和解释。他没有替学生指定专业，而是把「如何用 AI 放大自己的判断」作为新的学习框架。

item.title: vivo 首款无线头戴降噪耳机定档 5 月 29 日
item.guid: vivo-首款无线头戴降噪耳机定档-5-月-29-日
item.description:
vivo officially announced its first wireless over-ear noise-canceling headphones yesterday, to be released on May 29th at 19:30. The warm-up poster shows that these headphones will be available in cloud white and breeze purple, weighing approximately 238g. vivo 昨日官宣首款无线头戴降噪耳机，将于 5 月 29 日 19:30 发布。预热海报显示，这款耳机提供云雾白、微风紫两种配色，重量约 238g。

In terms of features, the headphones support highly immersive active noise cancellation, seamless cross-ecosystem triple connectivity, and multi-device switching. 功能上，该耳机支持高沉浸主动降噪、跨生态无缝三连接和多设备切换。

item.title: 1699 元起，XREAL 推出年轻副线品牌 xbx，首款 AR 眼镜 a01 亮相
item.guid: 1699-元起，XREAL-推出年轻副线品牌-xbx，首款-AR-眼镜-a01-亮相
item.description:
XREAL yesterday announced the launch of its youth sub-brand xbx (X by XREAL), with its first product being the xbx a01 series AR glasses. The new product focuses on portable large screens, gaming, and commute entertainment scenarios, with the brand slogan "Just play." XREAL 昨日宣布推出年轻副线品牌 xbx（X by XREAL），首款产品为 xbx a01 系列 AR 眼镜。新品主打随身大屏、游戏和通勤娱乐场景，品牌口号是「只管玩就好」。

The xbx a01 series features a translucent frame and a replaceable "versatile front frame" design, allowing users to swap front frames or 3D print custom accessories. The entire device weighs 62g, and comes with three sizes of nose pads, three-position adjustable flexible temples, and adaptive elastic hinges. xbx a01 系列采用半透明镜身和可更换「百变前框」设计，用户可以替换前框，也可以 3D 打印自定义配件。整机重量控制在 62g，配备三种尺寸鼻托、三档可调柔性镜腿和自适应弹性铰链。

For display, the xbx a01 supports 1600nits perceived brightness, 14 levels of brightness adjustment, HDR10, 1.07 billion colors, AI SDR to HDR conversion, and a 50° field of view, corresponding to a display effect of approximately 147 inches at 4 meters. 显示部分，xbx a01 支持 1600nits 感知亮度、14 档亮度调节、HDR10、10.7 亿色、AI SDR 转 HDR，以及 50° 视场角，对应 4 米外约 147 英寸显示效果。

The new product also features ultra-clear spatial stabilization, which reduces screen shake in mobile scenarios such as subways, high-speed trains, and airplanes through AI posture prediction, motion capture, and image pre-rendering. 新品还搭载超清空间防抖，通过 AI 姿态预测、动作捕捉和画面预渲染，在地铁、高铁、飞机等移动场景中降低画面晃动。

In terms of price, the xbx a01 is priced at 1699 yuan, and the xbx a01+ (with added sunshade and surround mode) is priced at 1799 yuan. 价格方面，xbx a01 售价 1699 元，xbx a01+（增加遮光罩和环绕模式）售价 1799 元。

item.title: 小米汽车发布世界模型框架，重建与生成一体化
item.guid: 小米汽车发布世界模型框架，重建与生成一体化
item.description:
Xiaomi Technology yesterday released the new Xiaomi Auto World Model framework, aimed at assisted driving world models, merging the reconstruction module WorldRec and the generation module WorldGen into the same system. According to reports, this solution avoids the serial path of first reconstructing the scene and then simply feeding it to the generation model, instead allowing the two sides to constrain each other: 小米技术昨日发布 Xiaomi Auto World Model 全新框架，面向辅助驾驶世界模型，把重建模块 WorldRec 与生成模块 WorldGen 合并进同一套系统。据介绍，该方案避免先重建场景再简单喂给生成模型的串联路径，改为让两侧互相约束：

WorldRec maintains an observation-extended 4D Gaussian global representation, providing 3D geometric priors for the generation model; WorldGen completes future frames, unobserved perspectives, and occluded areas, enabling the model to generate low-frequency but high-risk long-tail driving scenarios.

Xiaomi states that this framework achieves complementarity in stability, consistency, and realism. The generation side also uses two-stage training: first, pre-training with full bidirectional temporal attention, then entering causal fine-tuning, and reducing denoising steps from 50 to 4 through ODE distillation, accelerating it by 12 times. 小米称，这套框架在稳定性、一致性和真实性上形成互补。生成侧还采用两阶段训练：先用全双向时序注意力预训练，再进入因果微调，并通过 ODE 蒸馏把去噪步数从 50 步压到 4 步、提速 12 倍。

item.title: 阿里 Qwen3.7-Max 登顶国产第一，仅次于 Claude Opus 4.7 thinking
item.guid: 阿里-Qwen3.7-Max-登顶国产第一，仅次于-Claude-Opus-4.7-thinking
item.description:
Yesterday, Alibaba Cloud launched its new AI product official website Qwen Cloud and Agent product MuleRun for the overseas market, and updated its intelligent agent programming platform Qoder and general desktop intelligent agent QoderWork. 昨日，阿里云面向海外市场发布全新 AI 产品官网 Qwen Cloud、Agent 产品 MuleRun，并更新智能体编程平台 Qoder 与通用桌面智能体 QoderWork。

Qwen Cloud is positioned as an AI product entry point for overseas developers, offering three types of access: website, Skills, and CLI. The website is used for browsing, trying out, comparing models, and accessing OpenAI-compatible APIs; Skills encapsulate platform capabilities into standardized, Agent-readable instructions; CLI provides a repeatable command-line operation layer for developers and intelligent agents. Qwen Cloud 定位为面向海外开发者的 AI 产品入口，提供网站、Skills 和 CLI 三类入口：网站用于浏览、试用、比较模型并接入 OpenAI 兼容 API；Skills 将平台能力封装为 Agent 可读的标准化指令；CLI 面向开发者和智能体提供可重复调用的命令行操作层。

Alibaba Cloud also disclosed that Qwen3.7-Max scored 1541 on the LMArena Code Arena WebDev leaderboard, ranking second, only behind Claude Opus 4.7 thinking, surpassing Claude Opus 4.6, and ranking first among domestic products. 阿里云还披露，Qwen3.7-Max 在 LMArena Code Arena WebDev 榜单中得分 1541，排名第二，仅次于 Claude Opus 4.7 thinking，超越 Claude Opus 4.6，位列国产第一。

This model is designed for Agent scenarios and can collaborate with frameworks such as Claude Code, OpenClaw, and Hermes Agent to complete long-range tool invocation tasks. 该模型面向 Agent 场景，可与 Claude Code、OpenClaw、Hermes Agent 等框架协同，完成长程工具调用任务。

Alibaba Cloud has also transformed over 60 cloud products into Skill-based, MCP-based, and CLI-based formats, enabling cloud products to be called by Agents as standard capability modules. Additionally, Qwen3.7-Max automatically enables implicit caching by default on the Bailian platform, which can reduce input costs in some scenarios. 阿里云还把 60 多款云产品进行 Skill 化、MCP 化和 CLI 化改造，使云产品以标准能力模块供 Agent 调用。此外，Qwen3.7-Max 在百炼平台默认开启自动隐式缓存，可在部分场景降低输入成本。

item.title: 昆仑万维发布百万上下文 Agent 模型 SkyClaw-v1.0
item.guid: 昆仑万维发布百万上下文-Agent-模型-SkyClaw-v1.0
item.description:
Kunlun Wanwei Tiangong AI yesterday released SkyClaw-v1.0, positioned as a million-context Agent model for real workflows. The official statement said that the model supports millions of tokens of context, focusing on optimizing complex tool calls, multi-round task execution, code generation, file editing, interactive application building, and research-oriented data analysis. 昆仑万维天工 AI 昨日发布 SkyClaw-v1.0，定位为面向真实工作流的百万上下文 Agent 模型。官方称，该模型支持百万 token 上下文，重点优化复杂工具调用、多轮任务执行、代码生成、文件编辑、交互式应用构建与研究型数据分析。

SkyClaw-v1.0 has been optimized through large-scale mid-train, high-quality synthetic task SFT, and end-to-end reinforcement learning, enabling it to run in mainstream Agent environments such as OpenClaw, Hermes, and Nanobot, while also adapting to code Agent frameworks like Claude Code and Codex. SkyClaw-v1.0 经过大规模 mid-train、高质量合成任务 SFT 与端到端强化学习优化，可在 OpenClaw、Hermes、Nanobot 等主流 Agent 环境运行，同时适配 Claude Code、Codex 等代码 Agent 框架。

The official statement also said that the model demonstrates stable multi-step execution capabilities in mainstream Agent benchmarks and Skywork's internal Claw tasks, outperforming Minimax 2.7, DeepSeek V4 Flash, Qwen 3.6 35B A3B, and 27B models, and is priced at less than half of Minimax 2.7 and Qwen 3.6 series models. 官方还称，该模型在主流 Agent benchmark 与 Skywork 内部 Claw 任务中展现稳定的多步执行能力，表现超过 Minimax 2.7、DeepSeek V4 Flash、Qwen 3.6 35B A3B 和 27B 模型，定价低于 Minimax 2.7 与 Qwen 3.6 系列模型的一半。

item.title: 擎朗智能发布小尺寸人形机器人 XMAN-L1，接入豆包、腾讯等大模型
item.guid: 擎朗智能发布小尺寸人形机器人-XMAN-L1，接入豆包、腾讯等大模型
item.description:
According to Jiemian News, Keenon Robotics yesterday announced the launch of a new small-sized humanoid robot, XMAN-L1, positioned for lightweight interactive service scenarios. 据界面新闻报道，擎朗智能昨日宣布推出新型小尺寸人形机器人 XMAN-L1，定位面向轻量级互动岗位场景。

XMAN-L1 stands 136cm tall, has 42 bionic degrees of freedom, and its knee joint peak torque can reach 132 Nm, with a single leg power exceeding 2000W. The robot's edge computing power is 100TOPS, supporting connection to large models like Doubao and Tencent, enabling natural language dialogue. XMAN-L1 身高 136cm，拥有 42 个仿生自由度，膝关节峰值扭矩可达 132 牛·米，单腿功率超过 2000W。机器人端侧算力为 100TOPS，支持接入豆包、腾讯等大模型，可实现自然语言对话功能。

The official statement indicates that the robot can be put into immediate use after its release, applicable to scenarios including interaction, customer flow guidance, and lightweight performances. 官方表示，该机器人发布后可立即投入使用，适用场景包括互动、客流引导与轻量表演。

item.title: 面壁智能发布 MiniCPM5-1B，主打 2B 以下端侧文本模型
item.guid: 面壁智能发布-MiniCPM5-1B，主打-2B-以下端侧文本模型
item.description:
ModelBest and OpenBMB yesterday officially released and open-sourced MiniCPM5-1B. The official statement claims that this 1B parameter edge-side text base model scored 17.9 points in the Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index's small-sized model ranking, surpassing Qwen3.5-2B's 16.3 points. 面壁智能与 OpenBMB 昨日正式发布并开源 MiniCPM5-1B。官方称，这款 1B 参数端侧文本基座模型在 Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index 的小尺寸模型榜单中获得 17.9 分，超过 Qwen3.5-2B 的 16.3 分。

MiniCPM5-1B focuses on pushing the capabilities of text models to a lower deployment threshold. Official materials mention that after INT4 quantization, the model weight is about 0.5GB, allowing it to run on mobile phones, browsers, and low-resource terminals; its capabilities cover knowledge, mathematical reasoning, code reasoning, and tool calling. MiniCPM5-1B 的重点是把文本模型能力压到更低部署门槛。官方材料提到，INT4 量化后模型权重约 0.5GB，可在手机、浏览器和低资源终端上运行；能力覆盖知识、数学推理、代码推理和工具调用等维度。

ModelBest also disclosed that the Base Model version of MiniCPM5-1B was pre-trained by ForgeTrain. The official statement claims ForgeTrain is a production-grade large model pre-training framework written by AI, with a training speed 10% faster than Nvidia Megatron. 面壁还披露，MiniCPM5-1B 的 Base Model 版本由 ForgeTrain 预训练完成。官方称 ForgeTrain 是由 AI 编写的生产级大模型预训练框架，训练速度比英伟达 Megatron 快 10%。

item.title: 支付宝 AI 支付笔数达到 3 亿
item.guid: 支付宝-AI-支付笔数达到-3-亿
item.description:
Alipay yesterday announced that the number of payments made by its service intelligent agents has reached 300 million, and released AI Wallet, Token Pay, and ACT Protocol 2.0. The official statement said that this set of capabilities now covers leading development platforms, OpenClaw-like Agents, smart glasses, smart headphones, smart cockpits, and some AI tool platforms. 支付宝昨日官宣，其服务智能体支付的笔数已达到 3 亿，并发布 AI 钱包、Token Pay 和 ACT 协议 2.0。官方表示，这套能力已覆盖头部开发平台、OpenClaw 类 Agent、智能眼镜、智能耳机、智能座舱以及部分 AI 工具平台。

Alipay AI Wallet is for individual users, with the core function of managing intelligent agent authorizations and payment tasks. Users can view intelligent agent tasks before and during payment, and query bills after payment; Token Pay is for AI services billed by token. 支付宝 AI 钱包面向个人用户，核心是管理智能体授权与支付任务。用户可在支付前和支付中查看智能体任务，支付后查询账单；Token Pay 则面向按 Token 计费的 AI 服务。

Alipay also stated that its self-developed "AI Payment Smart Security System" has passed two security certifications from the China Academy of Information and Communications Technology's CAICT Lab, and has launched Token subsidies, 0 payment fees for individual developers, and enterprise fee discounts for AI developers. 支付宝还称，自研「AI 付智能安全系统」已通过中国信通院泰尔实验室两项安全认证，并向 AI 开发者推出 Token 补贴、个人开发者 0 支付费率和企业费率折扣。

item.title: 上海上线网络餐饮电子证照核验应用
item.guid: 上海上线网络餐饮电子证照核验应用
item.description:
The Shanghai Municipal Administration for Market Regulation yesterday launched the nation's first online catering electronic license verification application, aiming to combat "ghost takeaways." This application relies on the electronic business license system, connecting data links between regulatory authorities, platforms, and merchants, forming a closed loop from merchant application, license comparison, personal authorization, to platform display of licenses. 上海市市场监管局昨日推出全国首个网络餐饮电子证照核验应用，目标是整治「幽灵外卖」。该应用依托电子营业执照系统，打通监管部门、平台与商户的数据链路，形成从商户申请、证照比对、本人授权到平台亮证的闭环。

In terms of process, when a merchant registers on a platform, the submitted information is compared in real-time with the official database; after verification, the merchant's legal representative must complete real-name authentication and precise authorization through the "Electronic Business License" mini-program; the platform can then retrieve the official electronic license with the platform name and time added, and display it on the store's homepage. 流程上，商户入驻平台时，提交信息会与官方数据库实时比对；核验通过后，商户法定代表人需通过「电子营业执照」小程序完成实名认证和精准授权；平台随后可调取加注平台名称和时间的官方电子证照，并在店铺首页公示。

Regulatory authorities state that this mechanism shifts platforms from manual comparison and post-event handling to pre-verification, and can trace records of platforms obtaining merchant authorization to retrieve licenses. 监管部门称，这套机制把平台从人工比对和事后处置转向前置核验，并能追溯平台获得商户授权调取证照的记录。

item.title: 抖音公布 AI 谣言处置成果：相关内容平均浏览量下降 62%
item.guid: 抖音公布-AI-谣言处置成果：相关内容平均浏览量下降-62%
item.description:
Douyin yesterday disclosed that over the past year, the platform introduced large model technology in rumor governance, and the average views of disposed rumors decreased by 62%. The platform also reviewed the "Top Ten Rumor Debunking Cases" from the past year, stating that these rumors were all identified or handled by the AI Fact-Checking large model, and authoritative source information was summarized and debunking content generated through "Fact-Checking Cards." 抖音昨日披露，过去一年平台在谣言治理中引入大模型技术，被处置谣言的平均浏览量下降 62%。平台还盘点了过去一年「十大辟谣案例」，称这些谣言均经由 AI 求真大模型识别或处置，并通过「求真卡」汇总权威信源信息、生成辟谣内容。

Douyin previously launched the "AI Douyin Fact-Checking" function, allowing users to use large models to assist in identifying rumors and viewing real event information. In this disclosure, the platform positioned AI Fact-Checking as part of its rumor governance tools, used to reduce views before rumor spread. 抖音此前已上线「AI 抖音求真」功能，用户可通过大模型辅助辨别谣言、查看事件真实信息。平台在这次披露中把 AI 求真定位为谣言治理工具的一部分，用于降低谣言扩散前的浏览量。

item.title: 周杰伦《太阳之子》登陆 Apple Music 国区
item.guid: 周杰伦《太阳之子》登陆-Apple-Music-国区
item.description:
Jay Chou's new album "Son of the Sun" yesterday ended its approximately two-month paid exclusive period and landed on Apple Music in mainland China. 周杰伦新专辑《太阳之子》昨日结束约两个月付费独占，登陆苹果 Apple Music 国区。

The album was launched on global digital platforms on March 25 this year. Previously, it required separate paid purchase on platforms like QQ Music, with a single album costing about 40 yuan; now, Apple Music users in mainland China can listen directly via subscription. 该专辑今年 3 月 25 日已在全球数字平台上线，此前在 QQ 音乐等平台需要单独付费购买，单张专辑约 40 元；现在，Apple Music 国区用户可通过订阅直接收听。

JVR Music's official Weibo previously released 7 MVs from "Son of the Sun" since its launch. 杰威尔音乐官方微博此前已陆续发布《太阳之子》推出以来的 7 支 MV。

item.title: 《爱是愤怒》发布「温暖的家」预告，定档 6 月 19 日
item.guid: 《爱是愤怒》发布「温暖的家」预告，定档-6-月-19-日
item.description:
According to Weibo Movies, the film "Love is Anger" released its "Warm Home" trailer yesterday. The film is directed by Park Song-il, written by Li Zelin, with Wang Anyu playing Liu Hao and Wang Yuwen playing Chen Caicai. 据微博电影报道，影片《爱是愤怒》昨天发布「温暖的家」预告。影片由朴松日执导、里则林编剧，王安宇饰演刘浩，王玉雯饰演陈菜菜。

The trailer revolves around Liu Hao and Chen Caicai's meeting, falling in love, and starting a family. The two originally hoped to create a warm home, but their stable life was subsequently disrupted by an accident. The film is scheduled for release on June 19th during the Dragon Boat Festival holiday. 预告围绕刘浩与陈菜菜的相遇、相爱和组建家庭展开。两人原本期待打造一个温馨小家，安稳生活随后被意外打破。电影已定档 6 月 19 日端午假期。

item.title: 长征题材电影《四渡》定档 6 月 26 日
item.guid: 长征题材电影《四渡》定档-6-月-26-日
item.description:
The major revolutionary historical film "Four Crossings" officially announced its nationwide release on June 26th this year, commemorating the 90th anniversary of the Red Army's Long March victory. 重大革命历史题材电影《四渡》官宣定档今年 6 月 26 日全国公映，献礼红军长征胜利 90 周年。

The film is produced by Andrew Lau, written by Liu Yi, starring Liu Ye, Wang Lei, Wang Zhifei, Yu Shi, Wang Yaoqing, and others, and directed by Xu Zhanxiong. The film focuses on the historical event after the Zunyi Conference, where 30,000 Red Army soldiers, under the leadership of Comrade Mao Zedong, crossed the Chishui River four times amidst the encirclement of 400,000 enemy troops, achieving victory with fewer numbers. 影片由刘伟强监制，刘毅编剧，刘烨、王雷、王志飞、于适、王耀庆等主演，导演为徐展雄。电影聚焦遵义会议后，3 万红军在毛泽东同志领导下，于 40 万敌军围堵中四渡赤水、以少胜多的历史事件。
